name: curated_cpt_picker
description: Adds a 'Quick add codes' button to the note footer that opens a modal with a curated list of CPT codes — and an admin app for practice admins to maintain the curated list. Filters out any code that is not currently active in the ChargeDescriptionMaster.

protocols.description: Adds a 'Quick add codes' button to the note footer. Opens the curated CPT picker modal.
Provider-facing SimpleAPI. GET /picker renders the modal; POST /apply emits AddBillingLineItem effects for selected codes.
Admin CRUD SimpleAPI for the curated CPT list (list, add, update, delete). Validates each code against ChargeDescriptionMaster.

applications.name: Curated CPT Picker Admin
applications.description: Manage the curated CPT code list shown in the note-footer picker.
